creator: pablo53@poczta.onet.eu
text:
When fetching a package of around 600MiB size (texlive-texmf) pkg always fails at some moment. After the transfer stops it never resumes but waits the specified period of time to only show the message "Operation timed out". This happens randomly at 8% or even 82% of the downloading task. The only solution is to try to fetch the whole package again (from the 0th byte!), but then it fails again at some moment. Neverending and frustrating story...

Manipulating witch pkg.conf does not help. One can only postpone the moment of the alleged time-out, but not overcome the problem.
